reasoning: The control SC-12(2) focuses on the establishment and management of cryptographic keys, specifically symmetric keys. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to the management of secrets and etcd encryption. Ensuring that secrets are encrypted at rest and that etcd encryption is enabled are direct mappings to this control. Additionally, implementing a secret rotation policy aligns with key management practices. TLS for etcd ensures secure transmission of keys.
title: Cryptographic Key Establishment And Management - Cryptographic key establishment and management | symmetric keys produce, control
